privacy.title: Fa'alilolilo
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Pe a maua se ki fou o le potu - otometi ona lafo atu i au masini uma (E2E faʻailoga)
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi fa'ailoga o fe'au e maua i masini uma. E na'o le pisa o lo'o va'aia e le server
privacy.crossSignHint: Fa'amaonia otometi masini fou e ala i le saini a le HMAC (puipui mai le suitulaga)
privacy.backupHint: Fa'ailoga uma ki i se fa'aupuga ma fa'apolopolo ile server. I le suiga o masini - toe fa'afo'i i se fasifuaitau e tasi.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Fa'aliliu ki i se masini fou e ala ile numera 6 numera. O ki e fa'ailoga i le ECIES - e le mafai e le 'au'aunaga ona faitau.
privacy.newDevice: Ua ou i ai i se masini fou
privacy.ssssHint: Vaevae le ki matai i vaega N e faʻaaoga ai le polokalame a Shamir. So'o se vaega M e toe fa'afo'i le ki. O vaega ta'itasi ua fa'ailoga mo se fa'afeso'ota'iga fa'atuatuaina fa'apitoa (ECIES). O lo'o va'aia e le 'au'aunaga na'o poloka fa'ailoga.
privacy.federatedHint: Tufa atu fa'ailoga fa'ailoga fa'ailoga i node feterale (Shamir scheme). Tusa lava pe leiloa le server - toe faʻaleleia e ala i tupulaga.
privacy.ktHint: Fa'aopoopo-na'o ogalaau o suiga ki fa'alaua'itele uma i le filifili hash (Merkle). Sainia e le server ia fa'amatalaga ta'itasi - e iloa le fa'asese i le taimi o su'etusi.

panic.warningBody:
O le a e fa'amautu fa'aumatia fa'amaumauga uma.

Poloaiga avanoa:
/fesoasoani — Faaali atu le savali lenei

botConstructor.randomPick: E filifili fa'afuase'i e Bot le tasi
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: Fa'aoso pe a lafo e le tagata fa'aoga fe'au
botConstructor.docsCommand: Tali pe a lafo e se tagata fa'aoga se fa'atonuga fa'apitoa (eg /fesoasoani, /amata). E mafai ona e fa'aopoopoina la'asaga o talanoaga e fai ai fa'atalanoaga e tele-laasaga.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Tali pe a fetaui le fe'au a le tagata fa'aoga ma se mamanu. Fa'aaogā le regex - e.g. "Talofa|Talofa" e fetaui ma upu uma e lua. Fa'ailoga mata'upu.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: O le feʻau muamua e vaʻaia e tagata faʻaoga pe a latou amataina le bot ma / amata. E tatau ona tasi le bota uma.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: E otometi lava ona auina atu se savali i se faasologa. Lelei mo faʻamanatuga i aso taʻitasi, faʻasologa o vaiaso, poʻo faʻasalalauga faʻavaitaita.
botConstructor.docsCondition: O lo'o fa'alāpotopotoina le bot logic. Siaki se fesuia'iga po'o se fa'aoga a le tagata fa'aoga ma tali ese e fa'atatau i le i'uga.
botConstructor.docsRandom: E filifilia e Bot se tali se tasi mai le lisi. Lelei mo tausuaga, fautuaga, faʻafeiloaʻiga, poʻo tali eseese.
botConstructor.docsApi: Faia se talosaga HTTP i se API fafo ma faʻaoga le tali i le feʻau bot. Fa'aoga {data.field} e fa'asino ai vaega tali.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Auina atu se fa'amatalaga i le pule o le potu pe a fa'aoso. Fa'aoga mo fa'aliga, fa'amatalaga fou a tagata fa'aoga, po'o le fa'atonutonu.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Fa'aopoopo la'asaga i se Poloka Poloka e fai ai talanoaga fegalegaleai. O laasaga taʻitasi e fai ai se fesili, faʻatali mo le tali a le tagata faʻaoga, ma faʻasaoina i se fesuiaiga. Fa'aaoga fesuiaiga i le tali mulimuli ma {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Fa'aoga fusi fa'aa'ai {variable} i tusitusiga tali e fa'aofi ai mea taua O fe'au a le setete e tumau pea i fe'au.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Su'esu'ega fa'apipi'i e maua i tali uma:
botConstructor.docsVarUserId: ID tulaga ese o le tagata fa'aoga
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Moni pe afai o le tagata fa'aoga o le admin/owner
botConstructor.docsVarRoomId: ID o le potu o iai nei
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: E mafai ona e fa'aogaina le fa'atulagaina e pei o le HTML i tali:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Amata i se poloka Faʻafeiloaʻi - o le mea muamua lea e vaʻaia e tagata faʻaoga
botConstructor.docsTip2: Fa'aopoopo le /fesoasoani fa'atonuga e lisi uma ai fa'atonuga avanoa
botConstructor.docsTip3: Fa'aoga laasaga o talanoaga mo le resitalaina, su'esu'ega, po'o le aoina o fa'amaumauga
botConstructor.docsTip4: Fa'atasi poloka Tulaga fa'atasi ai ma fesuiaiga mo lala poto
botConstructor.docsTip5: Tofotofo lau bot e ala i le talanoa i ai i totonu o se potu pe a uma ona faʻapipiʻi

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Fa'asinomaga Gagana
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ose gagana tusitusi maualuga mo le fausiaina o bots. 96 foliga. Ele pito i tua.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: O le Gravitix o se gagana fa'apitoa (DSL) na fa'atulagaina mai i lalo mo le tusiaina o bots Vortex. O mea e mana'omia ai e isi gagana ni faletusi, toe fo'i, ma fa'avela, e avatu e Gravitix ia te oe tagata e fa'atautaia mea e tutupu muamua, felafolafoa'iga o talanoaga, ma le fa'atūina i totonu - uma i totonu o se fa'aoga mama ma mafai ona faitau fa'aosoina e Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Faitau - fa'ailoga e faitau pei o le fa'amoemoe, ae le o masini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Saogalemu - o ituaiga fa'atete'e e maua mea sese a'o le'i ta'avale
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Fa'aaliga - tafe, leoleo, ma mamanu fa'atusa ua fausia i totonu
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Laiti - leai ni vasega, leai se tofi, leai ni fa'avae e a'oa'o ai
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: O le Gravitix e mo soʻo se tasi e manaʻo e fausia vave se pusa Vortex - pe e te leʻi tusia muamua se tulafono, pe o oe o se tagata tomai faʻapitoa e le lava i le Python boilerplate. O lenei faʻamatalaga o loʻo aʻoaʻoina ai Gravitix mai mataupu muamua: e leai se poto masani e manaʻomia.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: O vaega taʻitasi e faʻavae i luga o vaega muamua. Afai e te fou i polokalame, faitau mai luga i lalo. Afai ua uma ona e iloa se isi gagana, fa'aoga le laulau o anotusi e oso sa'o ai i mea e te fiafia i ai.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Le auala saosaoa mai le zero i le tamo'e bot.
gravitixDocs.whatHappened: O le a le mea na tupu?
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — fa'amatala se tagata e fa'afoeina pe a lafo e se tagata fa'aoga /amata. emit "..." - toe auina atu se feʻau i le tagata faʻaoga. {ctx.first_name} — fa'aofi le igoa muamua ole tagata fa'aoga ile manoa.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: I le Gravitix IDE, kiliki le Run button i le pito i luga pa. Ulufale lau Vortex Bot Token pe a faʻamalosia. E amata loa le bot - e leai se laasaga e manaʻomia.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: O polokalame uma a le Gravitix e fausia mai poloka faufale e tolu: fa'atonu, fa'asalalau fa'amatalaga, ma le fa'atatau.
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterOn: O le a le mea e mulimuli ai
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterEmit: O le mea e alu i tua emit
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Fa'atauga e tele mo le fa'aoso e tasi
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: O tau uma i Gravitix e iai lona ituaiga. O le ituaiga faiga e tumau: o ituaiga e siaki i le taimi faʻapipiʻi, aʻo leʻi tamoe lau bot.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: O lo'o tu'ufa'atasia e le aufaipisinisi ia tau e maua ai ni tau fou.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: O manoa i Gravitix o le UTF-8 fa'ailoga tusitusiga. Latou te lagolagoina le tele o fesoʻotaʻiga ma se vaega o galuega faʻapipiʻi.
gravitixDocs.stringOperations: Fa'agaioiga laina e ala i totonu
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Mamanu-faafetaui se tau i le tele o mamanu. Mafaufau i ai o se faʻamatalaga sui malosi.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: O galuega e toe fa'aaogaina poloka o code. Latou te fesoasoani ia te oe e aloese mai le toe fai ma faafaigofie ona malamalama i le code.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: O le au faʻatau o le fatu lea o le Gravitix bot. E fa'alogo ta'itasi ta'itasi mo se ituaiga o mea na tupu ma tamo'e pe a tupu lena mea.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: E fa'atagaina oe e leoleo e fa'aopoopo se tu'utu'uga i se tagata e tagolima. E na'o le tamo'e lava o le tagata e fa'au'u pe afai e iloilo e le leoleo le moni.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: O le mea ctx e otometi lava ona maua i totonu o so'o se fa'atau. O loʻo i ai faʻamatalaga e uiga i le feʻau o loʻo iai nei ma le tagata faʻaoga na lafoina.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Fa'ataga e lau bot e manatua mea i le va o fe'au. A aunoa ma se setete, o feʻau uma e tutoʻatasi ma e leai se manatua o le bot.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Fa'agasolo e fa'atagaina oe e tusia ni talanoaga e tele la'asaga i se sitaili e mafai ona faitau. E mafai ona taofi le tafe ma fa'atali mo le isi fe'au a le tagata fa'aoga.
gravitixDocs.validationInFlow: Fa'amaonia i totonu o se tafega
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: O le auina atu o fe'au o le galuega muamua lea a le bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to - lafo i se tagata faʻapitoa
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Fa'asolo le code i luga o se fa'asologa - leai ni galuega cron, leai se auaunaga i fafo e mana'omia.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: uma - toe fai i se vaitaimi
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: i - tamoe i se taimi patino o le aso
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: O le paipa paipa |> pasi se tau e fai ma finauga muamua i le isi galuega. E mafai ai ona faitau fa'agaioiga filifili, agavale i le taumatau.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Ua saunia e le Gravitix le fa'atulagaina o mea sese ile taumafai / pu'e / mulimuli poloka.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Structs e fa'atagaina oe e fa'avasega fa'amaumauga e feso'ota'i i lalo o se ituaiga igoa. Enums fa'amatala se seti tapuni o fesuiaiga.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: O lo'o fa'auluina e le Gravitix se faletusi o le numera ma le ~ 180 galuega.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: O le Gravitix o lo'o i ai se ituaiga fa'alavelave masani - o se pea o 64-bit opeopea e fai ma sui o vaega moni ma mafaufauga.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: O le Gravitix o lo'o aofia ai fa'asologa fa'anumera: fa'atupu ma fa'atasiga fa'atatau i luga o galuega fa'atino.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Ole algebra laina ole numera ole vectors ma matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Numera a'oa'oga e su'esu'e uiga o numera. Fa'avae o fa'amatalaga fa'aonaponei.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Fuainumera maua meafaigaluega e faʻamatala, auʻiliʻili, ma faia faʻamatalaga mai faʻamaumauga.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: O galuega fa'apitoa o vaifofo ia taua fa'atusa fa'avasegaga.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: O le suiga a Fourier e fa'aleagaina se fa'ailo i ona laina fa'avae.
gravitixDocs.bp1: Taulima i taimi uma le le iloa
gravitixDocs.bp2: Fa'amaonia mea e fa'aoga ai tagata fa'aoga
gravitixDocs.bp3: Fa'aoga leoleo nai lo filifili-fai mo fa'atagaga
gravitixDocs.bp5: Fa'aaoga vave toe fo'i e fa'aitiitia ai fa'amoega
gravitixDocs.bp7: Toe seti ma le faaeteete le setete
gravitixDocs.bp8: Fa'aaoga le setete e puipuia ai le spam
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: O le auala sili e aʻoaʻo ai Gravitix o le fausiaina. Amata i se si'uleo bot faigofie, ona faaopoopo lea o le setete, ona faaopoopo lea o tafega. O manatu fou ta'itasi e te a'oa'oina e matala ai le tele o avanoa.

bestpractices.h1: 1. Taulima i taimi uma le le iloa
bestpractices.h2: 2. Fa'amaonia le fa'aoga a tagata fa'aoga
bestpractices.h3: 3. Fa'aoga guards nai lo filifili-fai mo fa'atagaga
bestpractices.h5: 5. Fa'aaoga vave return e fa'aitiitia ai fa'amoega
bestpractices.h7: 7. Toe setiina ma le faaeteete state
bestpractices.h8: 8. Fa'aaoga le state e taofia ai le spam
bestpractices.p1: Mamanu ma masani e fa'atuatuaina ai au Gravitix bots, mafai ona faitau, ma fa'atumauina.
bestpractices.p2: E tatau ona iai so'o se bots se fa'afo'i on msg fa'afoe ina ia maua e tagata fa'aoga se tali i taimi uma:
bestpractices.p3: Aua ne'i manatu e aoga le mea na lafo e le tagata fa'aoga:
bestpractices.p4: Faapuupuu le au fai. Fa'ase'e manatu lavelave i galuega fa'aigoaina:
bestpractices.p6: O le auala sili e a'oa'o ai le Gravitix o le fau. Amata i le simple echo bot, ona faaopoopo lea o le state, ona faaopoopo lea o le flows. O manatu fou ta'itasi e te a'oa'oina e matala ai le tele o avanoa.

complex_type.cc3: moni=0, ata=5 (int suffix e aoga foi)
complex_type.cc4: fa'atatau i le 7+0i i le fa'alavelave lavelave
complex_type.cc6: Polar form: fa'atusa le z i le tele ma le tulimanu
complex_type.cc8: O le a'a sikuea autu o le −1 o le i
complex_type.ct1: 🌀 Aisea e lavelave ai numera i se gagana bot?
complex_type.h1: O le a le numera lavelave?
complex_type.li5: Malosi: z**n fa'aaoga le fua fa'atatau a De Moivre mo le numera n.
complex_type.p1: O se numera lavelave e iai le foliga a + bi, lea a o le vaega moni ma le b o le vaega faalemafaufau. O le i o le iunite fa'afoliga fa'amatala e i² = −1. O numera lavelave e fa'alautele le laina moni i se va'alele, e mafai ai ona fofo fa'atusa e pei o x² + 1 = 0 e leai se tali moni.
complex_type.p2: I totonu o le Gravitix e te tusia fa'amatalaga fa'atusa ma le suffix i:
complex_type.p3: O fa'agaioiga fa'avae uma e fa'atino sa'o i fa'atatau lavelave. Gravitix o lo'o mulimulitai i tulafono fa'atatau lavelave masani:
complex_type.p4: Fa'asologa o fa'ailo (su'esu'ega leo, FFT), fa'atupu fa'asolo (Mandelbrot set), fa'ata'ita'iga o le fisiki, fa'atusatusaga o le fa'aogaina o le eletise, ma le fa'avasegaina o mea uma e mana'omia uma ai le numera lavelave. Gravitix fa'atagaina oe e fa'atino nei fa'atusatusaga i totonu o le Vortex bot e aunoa ma ni faletusi i fafo.
complex_type.td14: Mai polar form: r·e^(iθ) = r·cos θ + ir·sin θ
complex_type.td24: O galuega fa'avae fa'alautele atu ile va'aiga lavelave

emit.cc2: Fa'aoga le emoji mo le fa'aaliga vaaia
emit.h3: emit_to - lafo i se tagata fa'apitoa
emit.p1: Auina atu se feʻau i soʻo se tagata faʻaoga e ala ia latou ID (aoga i galuega faʻatulagaina poʻo faʻasalalauga faʻasalalauga):

error.cc1: e le manuia pe a lafo e le tagata le "alofa"
error.ct1: ⚠️ O afea e faʻaaoga ai try/catch
error.p1: Afi so'o se fa'ailoga e ono fa'aletonu ile poloka try. Afai o se mea sese o le thrown - a le o le Gravitix taimi ta'avale po'o le manino i lau fa'ailoga - oso le fa'atinoga i le poloka catch. O le tau maua e fusifusia i le fesuiaiga e te faaigoa i le catch.
error.p2: finally e tamoe e aunoa ma ni tuutuuga — pe na manuia le try pe na taulimaina e le catch se mea sese. Fa'aoga e fa'amatu'u mai ai puna'oa, tusi fa'amau, pe lafo se fe'au fa'amae'a.
error.p3: Fa'aoga le fa'afoeina o mea sese mo fa'agaioiga e fa'alagolago i mea mai fafo: fa'asoa tusitusiga a le tagata fa'aoga, vala'au API, faitau suiga o le si'osi'omaga, po'o le faia o numera lavelave pe a mafai ai mea sese (sqrt of negative, log of zero). Mo fa'aletonu i totonu, filifili guard fuaiupu ma vave returns.

examples.cc5: Fausia se manoa fa'ailoga simple CSV
examples.p1: Atoatoa, galue bots faʻaalia mamanu masani.
examples.p2: Le imple sili ona aoga bot — toe fai every mea e fai mai ai le tagata fa'aoga.
examples.p3: Se simple bot e faitau faamau oomi i le tagata e faaaogāina.
examples.p4: Ose su'ega filifiliga tele ma togi.
examples.p5: O se pule o galuega a le tagata lava ia mo le tagata fa'aoga.
examples.p6: Aoina fa'amatalaga fa'aoga e ala i se talanoaga.

flows.cc1: taofi i'i, toe amata pe a tali mai tagata
flows.cc2: wait mo so'o se feau tusitusia
flows.p1: Amata se flow i le run flow <name>:
flows.p2: wait taofi le taimi nei flow seia oʻo i le mea faʻapitoa e tupu. O le tau o le mea na tupu e returned:
flows.p3: A o'o i le flow wait, e fa'asaoina uma ona suiga fa'apitonu'u ma taofi. A lafo e le tagata fa'aoga le isi fe'au, e toe amata le flow i le mea tonu na tu'u ai. E tupu manino lenei mea - naʻo lou tusiaina o laina laina.

functions.p2: Tu'u fa'amaumauga i totonu o se galuega fa'atatau (igoa: ituaiga):
functions.p3: Ta'utino le ituaiga return pe a uma le -> ma fa'aaoga le return:
functions.p4: Fa'aoga fa'amaufa'ailoga mo ituaiga lautele i ta'otoga:
functions.p5: E mafai ona ta'ua e se galuega self (ma le fa'aeteete i le void toe fa'agata):
functions.p6: O le taimi fa'atino e fa'amalosia ai le loloto o le telefoni (e masani lava 200) e taofia ai le fa'aputuina o lugaflows.

guard.h4: Tele guards mo le poloaiga lava e tasi
guard.p1: Afai o le tagata fa'aoga e le o se pule, e le manuia le guard a le tagata muamua, ma o le Gravitix e pa'u atu i le pule lona lua.
guard.p2: Ia saunia i taimi uma se tagata e fa'afo'i tua e aunoa ma se guard e taulima ai le atigipusa pe a fa'ase'e uma guard tu'u. E fa'amautinoaina e tagata fa'aoga e maua i taimi uma se tali.

handlers.cc1: E fa'aoga lea mo isi fe'au tusitusia uma
handlers.cc2: ctx.text mo /echo talofa le lalolagi → "/echo talofa le lalolagi"
handlers.cc3: Toe fa'aopoopo everymea pe a uma le fa'atonuga
handlers.p1: Vortex poloaiga e amata i le /. Match i latou ma:
handlers.p2: E tamo'e mo so'o se feau tusitusia manino (e le o se fa'atonuga):
handlers.p3: E mafai ona e fa'auigaina le tele o aufaipese e te mana'omia. Latou te tamoʻe tutoatasi:

intro.li1: Mafaitau — fa'ailoga e faitau pei o le fa'amoemoe, ae le o masini.
intro.li2: Saogalemu — ituaiga static catch mea sese a'o le'i ta'avale
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, ma mamanu matching ua fausia i totonu.
intro.li4: Laiti — leai ni vasega, leai se tofi, leai ni auivi e aoao ai
intro.p1: Gravitix ose gagana fa'apitoa (DSL) fa'atulagaina mai i lalo mo le tusiaina o Vortex bots. O mea e mana'omia ai e isi gagana ni faletusi, toe fo'i, ma fa'afu, Gravitix e tu'uina atu ia te oe tagata e fa'afoeina mea tutupu, talanoaga flows, ma totonu state — uma i totonu o se fa'asologa mama, mafai ona faitau fa'aosoina e Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix e mo soʻo se tasi e manaʻo e fau vave se Vortex bot - pe e te leʻi tusia muamua ni faʻailoga, pe o oe o se tagata tomai faʻapipiʻi ua vaivai i le Python boilerplate. O loo aoao mai e lenei mau le Gravitix mai mataupu faavae muamua: e le manaomia se poto masani muamua.
intro.p3: O vaega taʻitasi e faʻavae i luga o vaega muamua. Afai e te fou i polokalame, faitau mai luga i lalo. Afai ua uma ona e iloa se isi gagana, fa'aoga le laulau o anotusi e oso sa'o ai i mea e te fiafia i ai.
intro.p4: I lenei fa'amatalaga atoa, o le → o lona uiga o le "su'esu'e i" po'o le "tuuina", ma le // ... o lo'o fa'aalia ai fa'amatalaga e le amana'ia e le tu'ufa'atasi.

math_calculus.cc10: Vaega ole afali'o ma le fa'ata'amilosaga 1: e tatau ona π/2
math_calculus.cc11: Taua fa'amoemoeina: E[X] = ∫ x·p(x) dx i luga o le tufatufaina masani
math_calculus.cc14: Fa'asologa o Taylor mo e^x i le x=0: 1 + x + x²/2! + x³/3! + ...
math_calculus.cc16: Laasaga metotia a Newton: x₁ = x₀ − f(x₀)/f'(x₀)
math_calculus.cc2: Ole fa'afuaaga lona lua ole x² ole 2 (curvature faifaipea)
math_calculus.cc7: Gradient o le f(x,y) = x² + y²
math_calculus.p1: O le mea fa'atupu f'(x) e fua ai le saoasaoa o suiga o le f i le itu x. Fa'a-geometric o le fa'ata'amilosaga lea o le laina fa'asaga. Gravitix fa'aogaina le eseesega tutotonu mo mea e maua mai muamua (sese O(h²)) ma le fa'asologa lona lua mo fa'asologa lona lua.
math_calculus.p2: O le integral ∫f(x)dx mai le a i le b o le vaega lea i lalo o le pi'o. Gravitix tuʻuina atu auala e tolu ma faʻateleina le saʻo:
math_calculus.td17: Aotelega Σ f(k) mo k = mai..to
math_calculus.td18: Oloa Π f(k) mo k = mai..to

math_complex.cc1: Fa'aliliuina o se mata'i i le tulimanu ole theta ile 2D
math_complex.cc10: (−1)^(1/3) e tolu a'a kupita i le vaalele lavelave
math_complex.cc2: e tutusa ma le fa'ateleina i le e^(i·theta)
math_complex.cc3: Liliu (1, 0) i le 90 tikeri = π/2 radians
math_complex.cc4: A'a o le lotogatasi: n-th a'a o le 1 o e^(2πik/n) mo k=0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Möbius transformation faafanua li'o/laina i li'o/laina
math_complex.cc8: faatasi ai ma le a=1,b=0,c=0,d=1 o le faasinomaga lea: w = z
math_complex.li2: Fua'upu arg(z) = atan2(b, a) — tulimanu mai le itu lelei moni.
math_complex.p1: O numera lavelave uma z = a + bi e mafai ona va'aia o se togi (a, b) i luga o le Argand plane. O le itu fa'ata'atia o le axis moni, o le tu'u sa'o o le axis fa'afoliga.
math_complex.p2: O se tasi o fa'asinomaga sili ona taua i le matematika: e^(ix) = cos x + i·sin x. O lona uiga o le li'o iunite i le va'alele lavelave e fa'ata'atia i le tulimanu x.
math_complex.p3: O le fa'alavelave lavelave, sine, cosine, ma le logarithm ua fa'alauteleina i le va'alele lavelave atoa. O la latou fa'asologa o Taylor e feso'ota'i i everymea (po'o luga o se tisiki mo ogalaau).
math_complex.p4: Mo le lavelave z ma le w, z^w = e^(w·ln z). Ole mea lea e fa'atagaina ai fa'amatalaga e le fa'atasi ma lavelave, fa'aalia ai feso'ota'iga fa'ateia:
math_complex.td12: Fa'alautele le z^n i fa'aupuga lavelave
math_complex.td4: Paranesi autu; fa'agata i luga ole tulaga moni leaga

math_core.cc1: Tulafono o cosines: c² = a² + b² − 2ab·cos(C)
math_core.p1: O galuega fa'avae uma e fa'amoemoe i tulimanu i radians. Fa'aaoga le radians(deg) e faaliliu mai tikeri.
math_core.td14: Leai se Numera (i'uga o le 0/0, ma isi)
math_core.td17: Tangent = agasala/cos. Le fa'amalamalamaina ile π/2 + nπ
math_core.td2: Fuafuaga o le li'o faataamilo i le lautele
math_core.td21: Angle o le vete (x,y) mai le itu-x lelei. Va'aiga (−π, π]. U'u x=0.
math_core.td25: Su'e tikeri i radians: d × π/180
math_core.td26: Ogalaau masani (faavae e). ln(e) = 1, ln(1) = 0. Domain x > 0.
math_core.td27: Ogalaau Binary. log₂(1024) = 10. Numera o bits e mana'omia.
math_core.td28: Ogalaau masani. log₁₀(1000) = 3. Fa'asologa o le tele.
math_core.td34: Fa'ata'amilo ile numera lata ane (afa ese mai le zero)
math_core.td35: Tu'u aga'i i le leai: fa'a(3.9) = 3, fa'aala(−3.9) = −3
math_core.td38: −1, 0, poʻo le 1 e faʻatatau i faʻailoga
math_core.td39: Moni pe afai |a−b| < eps (tua 1e-9). Fa'atusatusaga saogalemu float.
math_core.td4: Numera a Euler, fa'avae o le logarithm faanatura
math_core.td44: Taofi le x i le [lo, hi]
math_core.td46: Fa'afanua x mai le [a,b] i le [c,d]

math_linalg.cc1: Angle i le va o vectors e lua
math_linalg.cc3: Fa'atusa o [[2,1],[1,2]]: λ = 3 ma le λ = 1
math_linalg.p1: O le vector o se lisi fa'atonu o numera. E mafai ona fa'atusalia se vaega i le vateatea, se itu, se saoasaoa, po'o se vaega i le ML.
math_linalg.p2: O le matrix o se fa'asologa 2D o numera. O le m×n matrix e iai m laina ma n koluma. Matrix fa'agaioiga e fai ma autu o suiga laina.
math_linalg.td1: Totogi oloa: Σ aᵢ·bᵢ. O le taunuuga o se scalar. togi(a,b) = |a||b|cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Matrix fa'atele (A o le m×k, B o le k×n → i'uga m×n)
math_linalg.td11: Fa'atele le every elemene ile scalar s
math_linalg.td12: Fesuiai laina ma koluma: Aᵀ[i][j] = A[j][i]
math_linalg.td14: Fa'afeagai matrix A⁻¹ pei o le A·A⁻¹ = I (Gauss-Jordan)
math_linalg.td17: n×n fa'ailoga fa'ailoga (1s i luga o le fa'asolo)
math_linalg.td19: Foia le laina laina Ax = b e ala ile Gaussian elimination
math_linalg.td2: Fa'asoa fa'alava o vete 3D e lua. I'uga ⊥ mea uma e lua. |a×b| = |a||b|agasala θ
math_linalg.td4: Vaega Vete: v / |v|. O le umi e 1.
math_linalg.td7: Fa'atele elemene ta'itasi ile scalar s
math_linalg.td8: Element-fa'aopoopo poto o matrices tutusa lapopo'a

math_numth.cc1: RSA fa'avae autu e fa'alagolago ile modinv:
math_numth.cc4: Goldbach su'esu'e taumatematega: every e oo lava i le n>2 o le aofa'iga o prima e lua

math_numth.td13: Auala e filifili ai k mai n
math_numth.td19: Numera Stirling o ituaiga lona lua: vaevaega o le n i k vaega laiti e le o gaogao
math_numth.td21: Numera Catalan: fa'asologa o puipui, la'au binary
math_numth.td25: Numera Bernoulli (fa'aali i Taylor faasologa o trig/log)
math_numth.td3: Vaevae lelei uma o le n, fa'avasega. vaevae(12)=[1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ(n): faitau aofa'i o numera i le [1,n] fa'atasi i le n
math_numth.td5: Fa'afeagai fa'atusa: x fa'apea a·x ≡ 1 (mod m). Fa'aoga ile RSA.
math_numth.td6: Fa'atelega fa'aopoopo vave: fa'avae^exp mod. O(log exp).
math_numth.td7: Ole su'ega muamua ole Miller-Rabin (fa'atonu mo n < 3.2×10¹⁸)
math_numth.td8: Primes uma e oo atu i n e ala i Sieve o Eratosthenes
math_numth.td9: Prime factorization pei o le lisi. fa'ailoga_mua(12)=[2,2,3]

math_special.cc12: Perimeter ole ellipse ma semi-axes a, b:
math_special.cc2: P(−σ < X < σ) mo le tufatufaina masani
math_special.cc3: O le tumau a Apéry: ζ(3) e fa'aletonu ae e le'o iloa fo'i le tapuni
math_special.cc4: J₀(x): fe'ave'ai ma pala - fa'amatalaina galu fa'aalaala
math_special.cc5: Y₀(x): feeseesea'i ile x=0, fe'ave'ai mo le x tele
math_special.cc6: Ai ua pala tele mo le x→+∞, oscillates mo x→-∞
math_special.cc9: Vaitaimi o le pendulum ma le amplitude θ₀:
math_special.p1: O le Gamma function Γ(n) o le fa'aauau pea o le fa'aupuga o fa'ailoga: Γ(n) = (n−1)! mo numera lelei. E fa'alauteleina numera fa'alia i numera moni ma lavelave.
math_special.p2: O le galuega sese erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t²)dt o le vaega o le Gaussian. E feso'ota'i sa'o ma le masani CDF ma fa'aalia i fa'atusatusaga o le vevela ma le manatu fa'aletonu.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ mo n=1,2,3,… (pe a Re(s)>1). Faʻafesoʻotaʻi i le tufatufaina muamua e ala i le oloa Euler. O le Riemann Hypothesis (e le'i fofoina!) e aafia ai ni zero o le ζ i le vaalele lavelave.
math_special.p4: O galuega a Bessel Jₙ(x) ma le Yₙ(x) o vaifofo ia o le fa'atusatusaga eseese a Bessel: x²y'' + xy' + (x²−n²)y = 0. E aliali mai i le fa'aosoina o galu, fa'aosoina o le vevela i totonu o fa'agogo, ma fa'ainisinia quantum.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) ma le Bi(x) o vaifofo ia i le y'' = xy. E aliali mai i le quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) ma optics (diffraction).
math_special.p6: O nei aiga polynomial e tulaʻi mai o ni galuega faʻapitoa a tagata faʻatautaia taua ma faʻaaogaina i metotia faʻapitoa, quadrature, ma quantum mechanics.
math_special.p7: K(k) ma le E(k) o vaega elliptic atoatoa o le ituaiga muamua ma lona lua. Latou te fa'atatauina le vaitaimi o le pendulum e le laina ma le va'aiga o se ellipse.
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids siliflow mo x lapopoa.
math_special.td5: Pₙ(x): fa'asolosolo i luga [−1,1]. Vaega angular o galugalue hydrogen.
math_special.td6: Hₙ(x): w.r.t. e^(−x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td7: Tₙ(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): fa'atatauina polynomial sili ona lelei.
math_special.td8: Lₙ(x): fa'asologa i luga [0,∞) w.r.t. e^(−x). Gaioioiga o galu radial hydrogen.

math_stats.p1: Tuuina atu se lisi o numera, o nei galuega tauave e aotele ai le faʻaogaina autu o faʻamatalaga ma faʻasalalau:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov(X,Y) = E[(X−μₓ)(Y−μᵧ)] fuaina pe fealuai faatasi ni fesuiaiga se lua. Fa'amaopoopo r = cov(X,Y)/(σₓ·σᵧ) fa'avasegaina lea i le [−1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) fetaui lelei i le laina y = a + bx e ala i fa'amaumauga e fa'aaoga ai sikuea masani. Toe fo'i [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td11: CDF: P(X ≤ x) mo tufatufaga masani. Fa'aaogā fa'atatau erf.
math_stats.td12: P(X=k) = e^(−λ)·λᵏ/k! mo le tufatufaina o Poisson
math_stats.td15: Fa'ata'ita'iga mai le N(μ,σ) fa'aaogā le suiga o Pusa-Muller
math_stats.td3: Tau ogatotonu pe a fa'avasega. Mo e oo lava i le n, averesi o le lua tau ogatotonu.
math_stats.td5: Fua'iga fa'atafafa averesi mai lona uiga: Σ(xᵢ−μ)²/n
math_stats.td6: Va'aiga masani: √eseesega. Vaega tutusa ma faʻamaumauga.
math_stats.td8: Fa'asa'o i le fuaina o le fua o le iunite e leai: (xᵢ−μ)/σ

structs.p2: Enums fa'amatala se ituaiga e mafai ona avea ma se tasi o le tele o mea eseese. O fesuiaiga e mafai ona manino (pei o mea tumau) pe ave faʻamatalaga.

syntax.h2: O le a le mea e mulimuli ai emit
syntax.h4: Fa'atauga e tele mo le fa'aoso e tasi
syntax.li1: on <trigger> — filifili po o le a le mea na tupu e mu ai le tagata e fa'aulu
syntax.li2: emit <value> - lafo se fe'au; o le tau o se manoa, fesuiaiga, poʻo soʻo se faʻamatalaga
syntax.li3: Tele emit laina → tele fe'au eseese i le tagata fa'aoga
syntax.li4: Fa'ato'a fa'aulu mo le fa'aoso tutusa → siaki luga i lalo, muamua match malo
syntax.p1: E ta'u atu e le fa'aoso i le bot pe a e fa'agaoioi ai le tino o lo'o tagolima:
syntax.p2: emit auina atu se fe'au i le tagata fa'aoga. A uma ona e tu'u le tau e lafo:
syntax.p3: O emit ta'itasi e lafo se fe'au eseese. Latou te taunuu tasi ma le isi:
syntax.p4: E mafai ona e tusia ni nai on /command fa'atonu. O lo'o siaki i le fa'asologa - o le mea muamua e pasi le guard e tamo'e. Va'ai Guard Fuaiupu mo fa'amatalaga.
syntax.td1: So'o se feau tusitusia manino (e le o se fa'atonuga)

types.cc2: fa'amaulalo mo le mafai ona faitau
types.cc7: Siaki pe o iai le ki
types.cc9: State fanua e amata null seia tofia
types.p1: Ose 64-bit saini integer. Lagolagoina tulaga taua mai le −9.2 × 10¹⁸ i le +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: O nisi tulaga taua e mafai ona leai. Fa'atonu vaega ile ctx (pei ctx.username) atonu o le null. Siaki i taimi uma aʻo leʻi faʻaaogaina:
types.p11: Fa'aopoopo le ? pe a uma se ituaiga fa'ailoga filifili — o le tau e ono null. O le auala lea e faʻaalia ai e faʻasologa o galuega ma state fanua "atonu pe leai foi":
types.p12: Afai e le o iai i taimi uma se tau, fa'ailoga T? ma siaki i taimi uma != null a'o le'i fa'aaogaina. O le mauaina o se fanua null e le pa'u ai le bot — e returns null filemu.
types.p3: 10 / 3 fa'atasi ai ma fa'atauga int lua e tu'u ai le 3 (tapoti). Fa'aoga le 10.0 / 3.0 mo fa'ai'uga tesi.
types.p4: E lua tonu lava tulaga taua: true ma le false.
types.p5: Se manoa tusitusiga Unicode. O manoa o tulaga taua e le masuia.
types.p6: Se fa'asologa fa'asologa o tau, e tutusa uma ituaiga T.
types.p7: Avanoa i se faasino igoa i fafo o le lautele (fa'ata'ita'iga, nums[99] pe a iai le lisi e 5 elemene) returns null nai lo le pa'u o lau bot.
types.p8: O se fa'aputuga o pa'aga autu-taua. E tatau ona tutusa uma ituaiga, o tau e tatau ona tutusa uma ituaiga.
types.p9: Le return ituaiga o galuega tauave e le return se tau. E seasea ona e tusia void manino - o le faaletonu pe a leai se ituaiga return e faʻamaonia.

variables.cc7: e le maua le fa'afeiloa'iga iinei
variables.ct1: ℹ️ Le taimi e fa'ailoa ai
variables.li1: E tatau ona amata i se mataitusi po'o se va'ai lalo: name, _temp
variables.li2: E mafai ona iai mataitusi, numera, va'ava'ai lalo: user_count, page2
variables.li4: E le mafai ona avea ma upu autu: let, fn, on, if…
variables.p1: O fesuiaiga e teu ai tau e mafai ona e fa'aogaina ma suia i lau polokalame atoa.
variables.p3: O le tagata fa'apipi'i e fa'ailoa le ituaiga mai le tau i le itu taumatau. E te le manaʻomia lava ona e tusia faʻamaonia le ituaiga - ae e te mafai.
variables.p4: Fa'aopoopo le : TypeName pe a uma le igoa fesuia'i:
variables.p5: O faʻamatalaga e filifili - faʻaaoga pe a le o manino le ituaiga mai le tau, poʻo le taimi e te manaʻo ai e fai le code self-faʻamaumauga.
variables.p6: O fesuiaiga e suia ona o le faaletonu. Tofi se tau fou ile =:
variables.p7: Fa'aoga snake_case mo fesuiaiga ma galuega tauave: user_name, message_count.
variables.p8: O lo'o iai suiga i totonu o le poloka { } o lo'o fa'aalia i totonu. E le o va'aia i fafo atu o lena poloka:
